name: libgdbm-compat4t64
title: libgdbm-compat4t64
summary: GNU dbm database routines (legacy support runtime version)
description:
GNU dbm database routines (legacy support runtime version)
GNU dbm ('gdbm') is a library of database functions that use extendible
hashing and works similarly to the standard UNIX 'dbm' functions.
.
The basic use of 'gdbm' is to store key/data pairs in a data file, thus
providing a persistent version of the 'dictionary' Abstract Data Type
('hash' to perl programmers).
This package includes library files, required to run old programs,
that use legacy 'dbm' interface. For new programs, please use modern
interface, provided by libgdbm6t64 and libgdbm-dev.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libgdbm-compat4t64 because GNU dbm database routines (legacy support runtime version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libgdbm-compat4t64 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libgdbm-compat4t64 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libgdbm-compat4t64 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
